title: oenothera stricta var. propinqua
intro: Oenothera stricta var. propinqua, also known as the pink evening primrose or prairie evening primrose, is a perennial wildflower native to the prairies of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Oenothera stricta var. propinqua include reducing inflammation and improving symptoms of conditions such as eczema, acne, and menopausal symptoms. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal benefits.
